name: Exercise 1 — trajectory (starter)
description: Case A1001 is done for you. Fill in the two TODO cases, then run the eval. See exercises/01_trajectory/README.md.

parts.text: Hi, I'd like a refund for my order A1001.
I've approved a $79.99 refund for order A1001 (Wireless headphones). It will appear on your original payment method within 5-7 business days. Is there anything else I can help with?
